title: v0.2.0
description: Calendar improvements, release and deploy workflow fixes, Tauri icons, and binary-only download links on the site. Prebuilt CLI, daemon, TUI and desktop app for Windows, Linux and macOS.

changes.text: Web calendar: fixed cell height, deduplication by parent, status colors, recurring task prompt edit, date alignment (month view)
Release workflow: one zip per artifact (no duplicate asset names), workflow_dispatch for manual run, deploy_site checkout
Update Release Notes workflow: multiline GITHUB_OUTPUT for description/title, workflow_dispatch with optional inputs
Tauri app icons: ICO and ICNS generated from icon.png for Windows and macOS
Site download page: direct links to binary archives only; note to not use Source code zip/tar.gz on GitHub

title: v0.1.0
description: Précompilés Akasha (CLI + daemon + TUI) + doc. Décompressez l'archive pour votre OS puis lancez akasha init puis akasha start.

title: Initial Release
description: First public release of Akasha — your privacy-first personal assistant.

changes.text: Core assistant engine with natural language processing
Local-first architecture — all data stays on your machine
Built-in skill library with 10 starter skills
